events.label: reasoning
events.text: The hazard is standing in line with the tendon during stressing. This is a critical safety hazard in post-tensioning work. Tendons under high tension can snap/whip violently, causing serious injury or death. PTI clearly prohibits standing in line with the tendon during stressing operations.

  "findings": [
    "Personnel standing in line with the tendon during active stressing operations, creating exposure to catastrophic tendon whip/rupture hazard",
    "Stressing operation being performed without maintaining required exclusion zone and safe positioning per PTI procedures"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt stressing operations and clear all personnel from the tendon line of fire",
    "Establish and enforce a tendon exclusion zone—no personnel in line with the tendon during stressing; only the jack operator at the controls, positioned off-axis",
    "Brief all PT crew on PTI safe stressing procedures, including barricading the tendon path and using remote/offset positioning",
    "Do not resume stressing until the PTI-compliant exclusion zone and safe access/egress are verified by the inspector/superintendent"
  ],
  "rationale": "Standing in line with a tendon during stressing is one of the most dangerous conditions in post-tensioning. A tendon under high load can fail suddenly and whip with lethal force. PTI requires that no one be in the line of the tendon during stressing and that barricades/exclusion zones be maintained. This is a critical, immediate-stop condition.",
  "references": ["PTI"]
}
